explanation: The 'UI + API Gateway' component shows signs of being greedy by combining two major responsibilities: serving the user interface (static resources) and acting as a gateway for all backend REST requests. This violates the single responsibility principle. Such a component can easily accumulate business logic and complex routing rules, becoming a mini-monolith. It acts as a single point of failure and a bottleneck, coupling the evolution of the UI with the backend services and hindering independent deployment and scalability.
